mapper.select: select parent_id from am_archive_category where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false
select count(*) from am_archive_category where parent_id = #{categoryId} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.update: update am_archive_category set item_table_name = case when #{archiveLevel} = 'item' then #{tableName} else item_table_name end, volume_table_name = case when #{archiveLevel} = 'volume' then #{tableName} else volume_table_name end, table_status = #{tableStatus}, built_at = localtimestamp, updated_by = #{userId}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.select: select id, archive_level, parent_id, fonds_code, fonds_name, category_code, category_name, archive_no, electronic_status, archive_year, display_order, locked_flag, lock_reason, locked_by, locked_at from am_archive_record where deleted_flag = false order by sort_order, id desc

select r.id, r.fonds_code ${selectColumns} from am_archive_record r join ${tableName} d on d.id = r.id where r.deleted_flag = false and d.deleted_flag = false and r.archive_level = #{archiveLevel} order by r.id

insert into am_archive_record (archive_level, parent_id, fonds_code, fonds_name, category_code, category_name, archive_no, electronic_status, archive_year, created_by, updated_by) values (#{archiveLevel}, #{parentId}, #{fondsCode}, #{fondsName}, #{categoryCode}, #{categoryName}, #{archiveNo}, #{electronicStatus}, #{archiveYear}, #{userId}, #{userId}) returning id
mapper.update: update am_archive_record set archive_no = #{archiveNo}, parent_id = #{parentId}, fonds_code = #{fondsCode}, fonds_name = #{fondsName}, electronic_status = #{electronicStatus}, archive_year = #{archiveYear}, updated_by = #{userId}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false and locked_flag = false
mapper.select: select id, archive_level, parent_id, fonds_code, fonds_name, category_code, category_name, archive_no, electronic_status, archive_year, locked_flag, lock_reason, locked_by, locked_at from am_archive_record where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false

select id, archive_record_id, physical_status, box_no, location_no, barcode, remark, created_at, updated_at from am_archive_physical_object where archive_record_id = #{archiveRecordId} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.insert: insert into am_archive_physical_object (archive_record_id, physical_status, box_no, location_no, barcode, remark, created_by, updated_by) values (#{archiveRecordId}, #{physicalStatus}, #{boxNo}, #{locationNo}, #{barcode}, #{remark}, #{userId}, #{userId}) on conflict (archive_record_id) where deleted_flag = false do update set physical_status = excluded.physical_status, box_no = excluded.box_no, location_no = excluded.location_no, barcode = excluded.barcode, remark = excluded.remark, updated_by = excluded.updated_by, version = am_archive_physical_object.version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp

insert into am_archive_record_audit (source_table_name, source_record_id, archive_record_id, fonds_code, category_code, operation_type, operation_reason, operated_by) values (#{sourceTableName}, #{sourceRecordId}, #{archiveRecordId}, #{fondsCode}, #{categoryCode}, #{operationType}, #{operationReason}, #{operatedBy})
mapper.update: update am_archive_record set deleted_flag = true, updated_by = #{userId}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false and locked_flag = false

update am_archive_record set locked_flag = true, lock_reason = #{lockReason}, locked_by = #{lockedBy}, locked_at = localtimestamp, updated_by = #{lockedBy}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false

update am_archive_record set locked_flag = false, lock_reason = null, locked_by = null, locked_at = null, updated_by = #{userId}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.insert: insert into am_archive_record_search (archive_record_id, search_text, index_version) values (#{archiveRecordId}, #{searchText}, #{indexVersion}) on conflict (archive_record_id) do update set search_text = excluded.search_text, index_version = excluded.index_version, updated_at = localtimestamp
mapper.select: select id, archive_record_id, event_type from am_archive_record_search_outbox where status = 'PENDING' and (next_retry_at is null or next_retry_at <= localtimestamp) order by id limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update am_archive_record_search_outbox set status = 'PROCESSED', processed_at = localtimestamp, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id}

update am_archive_record_search_outbox set status = 'PENDING', attempts = attempts + 1, last_error = #{lastError}, next_retry_at = localtimestamp + interval '1 minute', updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select archive_record_id, search_text <@> #{keyword} as score from am_archive_record_search where search_text @@@ #{keyword} order by score, archive_record_id desc

select id, category_id, archive_level, constraint_code, constraint_name, include_fonds, index_name, enabled, created_at, updated_at from am_archive_unique_constraint where category_id = #{categoryId} and deleted_flag = false order by archive_level, id

select id, category_id, archive_level, constraint_code, constraint_name, include_fonds, index_name, enabled, created_at, updated_at from am_archive_unique_constraint where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false

insert into am_archive_unique_constraint (category_id, archive_level, constraint_code, constraint_name, include_fonds, index_name, enabled, created_by, updated_by) values (#{categoryId}, #{archiveLevel}, #{constraintCode}, #{constraintName}, #{includeFonds}, #{indexName}, #{enabled}, #{userId}, #{userId}) returning id
mapper.update: update am_archive_unique_constraint set archive_level = #{archiveLevel}, constraint_code = #{constraintCode}, constraint_name = #{constraintName}, include_fonds = #{includeFonds}, index_name = #{indexName}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_by = #{userId}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and category_id = #{categoryId} and deleted_flag = false

update am_archive_unique_constraint set deleted_flag = true, updated_by = #{userId}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and category_id = #{categoryId} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.insert: insert into am_archive_unique_constraint_field (constraint_id, field_id, field_order) values (#{constraintId}, #{fieldId}, #{fieldOrder})
mapper.select: select rf.id, rf.constraint_id, rf.field_id, rf.field_order, f.archive_level, f.field_code, f.field_name, f.column_name from am_archive_unique_constraint_field rf join am_archive_field f on f.id = rf.field_id and f.deleted_flag = false where rf.constraint_id = #{constraintId} order by rf.field_order, rf.id
mapper.update:
update am_archive_field set exact_searchable = true, updated_by = #{userId}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where category_id = #{categoryId} and deleted_flag = false and id in
#{fieldId}

update am_archive_record set parent_id = #{volumeId}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, updated_by = #{userId}, version = version + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{archiveRecordId} and archive_level = 'item' and deleted_flag = false and locked_flag = false
